name: Vegetable Cheese Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 9-inch pan or baking dish with margarine.
2. Place 4 slices of bread in the bottom of the pan and sprinkle with half the cheese and green onions.
3. Arrange remaining bread slices on top.
4. In a small bowl, combine eggs, milk, mayonnaise, Tabasco, basil, and salt; mix well.
5. Pour egg mixture over the bread, pressing to ensure the bread is covered.
6. Refrigerate for 30 minutes or longer.
7. Uncover the casserole and top with thin slices of tomatoes and sprinkle remaining cheese.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 30-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand 10-15 minutes before serving.
